list.description: Widget - Base class for all ntelioUI2 widgets

UIUtils - DOM helper utilities

Requires jQuery to be loaded via <script> tag

list.title: AlertDialog
list.description: Create an alert dialog.

list.title: AlertDialog.show
list.description: Show a promise-based alert dialog.

list.title: Application#_buildNavbarMenu
list.description:
Build the navbar menu from this.menu config.
Can be called again to refresh menu items (e.g. after auth changes).

list.title: Application#changePage
list.description:
Route to a new page. Destroys the current page and loads the next one.

The route map value can be:
- A class reference (e.g. DashboardPage) → instantiated directly
- A string path (e.g. 'pages/Dashboard') → loaded via ModuleManager

list.title: Application#init
list.description:
Initialize the application shell: load CSS, build navbar, breadcrumbs,
footer, and start the page router.

list.title: Application#setFooterHtml
list.description: Set footer content.

list.title: Application#setMenu
list.description: Update the sidebar menu items at runtime.

list.title: Application.load
list.description: Bootstrap the application. Call from your Main.js entry point.

list.title: Autoform#RESET_EVENT
list.description: Event name emitted after form fields are reset

list.title: Autoform#SKIP_EVENT
list.description: Event name emitted when the form is skipped (chatbot mode)

list.title: Autoform#SUBMIT_EVENT
list.description: Event name emitted on successful form submission

list.title: Autoform#beforeDestroy
list.description:
Widget lifecycle hook — caches form data before the DOM is removed
so that {@link getData} and {@link stringify} still return values
after the form is destroyed.

list.title: Autoform#fieldInitializers
list.description:
Post-render initializers for complex field types.
Each entry is a {@link FieldInitializer} keyed by {@link FieldType}.
Called automatically by {@link _initializeFields} after HTML is appended.

list.title: Autoform#getData
list.description:
Get all field values as a plain object.
Safe to call after destroy — returns the cached snapshot.

list.title: Autoform#getFormData
list.description:
Build a `FormData` object suitable for multipart/form-data uploads.
File fields are appended as `File` objects; arrays are JSON-stringified.

list.title: Autoform#init
list.description:
Load CSS, render all fields, run initializers, and wire up buttons.
Call manually since `autoInit` is `false`.

list.title: Autoform#onBeforeSubmit
list.description:
Called after validation passes, just before the form is destroyed.
Override in subclasses to perform side-effects or cancel submission.

list.title: Autoform#onValidationError
list.description:
Called when validation fails. Default implementation highlights invalid fields.
Override to provide custom error display (e.g. toast notifications).

list.title: Autoform#reset
list.description:
Reset all fields to their initial values (from the field definitions).
Multi-value types re-run their initializers to rebuild tag UI.
Emits {@link Autoform.RESET_EVENT}.

list.title: Autoform#stringify
list.description:
Human-readable HTML summary of all field values.
Safe to call after destroy — returns the cached snapshot.

list.title: Autoform#template
list.description: Outer shell template with header, form slot, and footer buttons

list.title: Autoform#templates
list.description:
HTML templates keyed by {@link FieldType}.
Placeholders use `{{key}}` syntax resolved by {@link _resolveFieldValues}.

list.title: Autoform#validate
list.description: Validate all fields against their constraints (required, pattern, min/max, custom).

list.title: Autoform.merge
list.description: Shallow-merge two config objects. `map1` properties win over `map2`.

list.title: BreadCrumbs#BreadCrumbs
list.description: Create a new BreadCrumbs widget.

list.title: BreadCrumbs#add
list.description: Append a breadcrumb to the trail.

list.title: BreadCrumbs#clear
list.description: Clear all breadcrumbs.

list.title: BreadCrumbs#init
list.description: Load breadcrumbs CSS and perform the initial render.

list.title: BreadCrumbs#set
list.description: Replace all breadcrumbs.

list.title: ConfirmDialog
list.description: Create a confirm dialog.

list.title: ConfirmDialog.show
list.description: Show a promise-based confirmation dialog.

list.title: EventBusClass
list.description: Create a new EventBus instance with an empty handler registry.

list.title: EventBusClass#_handlers
list.description: Map of event name to handler arrays

list.title: EventBusClass#clear
list.description: Clear all event handlers

list.title: EventBusClass#emit
list.description: Emit an event

list.title: EventBusClass#off
list.description: Unsubscribe from an event

list.title: EventBusClass#on
list.description: Subscribe to an event

list.title: EventBusClass#once
list.description: Subscribe to an event once

list.title: FieldInitializer
list.description:
Post-render setup function for complex field types.
Receives the form instance and the field definition.

list.title: I18n.getLocale
list.description: Get the current locale code.

list.title: I18n.load
list.description: Load translations from a JSON file at {basePath}/{locale}.json

list.title: I18n.loadTranslations
list.description:
Load translations for a locale from a plain object.
Merges with any existing translations for that locale.

list.title: I18n.setLocale
list.description: Set the current locale for translations.

list.title: I18n.t
list.description:
Translate a key using the current locale's translations.
Supports {{param}} interpolation.

list.title: I18n.translate
list.description: Alias for {@link I18n.t}.

list.title: LoginDialog#LoginDialog
list.description:
Create a new LoginDialog instance. Not typically called directly —
use {@link LoginDialog.open} instead.

list.title: LoginDialog#init
list.description: Load the login dialog CSS stylesheet.

list.title: LoginDialog.open
list.description:
Open a login dialog and return a Promise.
Resolves with the authenticate() return value on success.
Rejects if the dialog is dismissed.

list.title: Modal#Modal
list.description: Create a new Modal dialog.

list.title: Modal#beforeDestroy
list.description: Dispose the Bootstrap modal instance and clean up backdrop/body state.

list.title: Modal#close
list.description: Close the modal programmatically.

list.title: Modal#init
list.description:
Initialize the modal: load CSS, set body content, build footer buttons,
and bind event handlers.

list.title: Modal#open
list.description: Open the modal. Appends to body if needed and initializes Bootstrap Modal.

list.title: Modal#setBody
list.description: Update the modal body content.

list.title: Modal#setTitle
list.description: Update the modal title text.

list.title: Modal#showBodyLoading
list.description: Replace the modal body with a centered loading spinner.

list.title: Modal.showContent
list.description:
Fetch content from a URL and display it in a modal.
Replaces the old ModalContentPopup class.

list.title: ModuleManager.load
list.description: Dynamically import a module by path and class name.

list.title: Page
list.description: Create a new Page instance.

list.title: Page#defaultTemplate
list.description: Default HTML template shown when a page subclass has no custom template

list.title: PageNotFound
list.description: Create a PageNotFound instance.

list.title: PageNotFound#init
list.description: Load the page-not-found CSS stylesheet.

list.title: PageRouter.disable
list.description: Disable route handling. Hash changes will be ignored until {@link enable} is called.

list.title: PageRouter.enable
list.description: Re-enable route handling after a previous {@link disable} call.

list.title: PageRouter.getCurrentClassName
list.description: Get the class name mapped to the current path.

list.title: PageRouter.getCurrentPath
list.description: Get the current path string.

list.title: PageRouter.getLabel
list.description: Get the label for a given path (as registered via labelsMap).

list.title: PageRouter.getPathComponents
list.description: Get the current path as an array of components.

list.title: PageRouter.getRoute
list.description: Resolve the current URL hash to a route. Uses longest-prefix matching.

list.title: PageRouter.navigate
list.description: Navigate to a path. Sets location.hash which triggers popstate/hashchange.

list.title: PageRouter.onPageChange
list.description:
Register a callback for route changes. Fires immediately with current route,
then on every subsequent hash change.

list.title: PageRouter.registerRoute
list.description: Register a single route.

list.title: PageRouter.registerRoutes
list.description: Register multiple routes at once.

list.title: ResourceLoader.injectCSS
list.description: Inject inline CSS into the document

list.title: ResourceLoader.isLoaded
list.description: Check if a resource URL has already been loaded.

list.title: ResourceLoader.loadCss
list.description: Load a CSS stylesheet

list.title: ResourceLoader.loadScript
list.description: Load a JavaScript file

list.title: Sidebar#Sidebar
list.description: Create a new Sidebar widget.

list.title: Sidebar#beforeDestroy
list.description: Clean up the hash-change listener before destruction.

list.title: Sidebar#init
list.description:
Load sidebar CSS, render menu items, attach click handlers,
and set up hash-change highlighting.

list.title: Sidebar#setActive
list.description: Highlight a specific menu item by URL.

list.title: Sidebar#setItems
list.description: Replace menu items at runtime.

list.title: Toast#Toast
list.description:
Create a new Toast instance. Typically called via static convenience
methods (success, error, warning, info, show) rather than directly.

list.title: Toast#beforeDestroy
list.description: Clean up the auto-dismiss timer before destruction.

list.title: Toast#dismiss
list.description: Animate the toast out and destroy it. Safe to call multiple times.

list.title: Toast.error
list.description: Show an error toast (default 8s duration).

list.title: Toast.info
list.description: Show an info toast.

list.title: Toast.show
list.description: Create and display a toast notification.

list.title: Toast.success
list.description: Show a success toast.

list.title: Toast.warning
list.description: Show a warning toast.

list.title: UIUtils.debounce
list.description: Debounce a function: delays invocation until `wait` ms after the last call.

list.title: UIUtils.disable
list.description:
Disable all interactive elements within a container.
Adds the 'disabled' class to the container and sets the disabled attribute
on inputs, buttons, selects, textareas, and links.

list.title: UIUtils.enable
list.description:
Enable all interactive elements within a container.
Removes the 'disabled' class and the disabled attribute from
inputs, buttons, selects, textareas, and links.

list.title: UIUtils.escapeHtml
list.description: Escape HTML entities in a string to prevent XSS.

list.title: UIUtils.throttle
list.description: Throttle a function: ensures at most one invocation per `limit` ms.

list.title: UIUtils.uniqueId
list.description: Generate a unique ID string.

list.title: VerticalNavbar#VerticalNavbar
list.description: Create a new VerticalNavbar.

list.title: VerticalNavbar#init
list.description: Load the sidebar theme CSS and mark the body for sidebar layout.

list.title: VerticalNavbar#setBottomItems
list.description: Set the bottom menu items (pinned to bottom).

list.title: VerticalNavbar#setMenuItems
list.description: Set the main menu items (middle section).

list.title: VerticalNavbar#setTheme
list.description: Switch sidebar theme and persist to localStorage.

list.title: Widget#Widget
list.description:
Construct a new Widget. Handles template parsing, DOM node creation,
registry registration, and optional auto-initialization.

list.title: Widget#_allWidgets
list.description: Global registry mapping widgetId → Widget instance. Enables lookup by ID and tracks all live widgets

list.title: Widget#_checkDestroyed
list.description:
Guard check: logs a warning and returns true if this widget has been destroyed.
Call at the start of methods that should not operate on dead widgets.

list.title: Widget#add
list.description:
Add a child widget: sets parent relationship, appends to DOM, and
tracks in the _widgets array for lifecycle management.

list.title: Widget#appendTo
list.description: Append this widget's root node as a child of the given container.

list.title: Widget#beforeDestroy
list.description:
Pre-destroy hook. Override in subclasses to clean up external resources
(e.g. dispose Bootstrap components, remove global listeners, cancel timers).
Called at the start of destroy() before children are destroyed.

list.title: Widget#clear
list.description:
Destroy all child widgets and empty the children array.
Does not destroy this widget itself.

list.title: Widget#destroy
list.description:
Tear down this widget and all its children. Execution order:
  1. beforeDestroy() — subclass cleanup hook
  2. Clear all event handlers
  3. Recursively destroy child widgets (iterates a copy to avoid mutation bugs)
  4. Remove self from parent's _widgets array
  5. Unregister from the global widget registry
  6. Remove the DOM node
  7. Fire the onDestroy callback
  8. Set the _destroyed flag

Safe to call multiple times (no-ops after first call).

list.title: Widget#disable
list.description: Disable all interactive elements (inputs, buttons, links) within this widget.

list.title: Widget#emit
list.description:
Dispatch an event to all registered handlers, then bubble up to the parent widget.
Handlers receive (data, emittingWidget). Errors in handlers are caught and logged
to prevent one bad handler from breaking others.

Bubbling can be stopped by setting data.bubbles = false.

list.title: Widget#enable
list.description: Re-enable all interactive elements within this widget.

list.title: Widget#find
list.description:
Run a jQuery selector scoped to this widget's root node.
IMPORTANT: Use '> .class' (direct child) to avoid matching inside nested child widgets.

list.title: Widget#focus
list.description: Give keyboard focus to this widget's root node.

list.title: Widget#get
list.description: Return this widget's root jQuery node. Used when appending to another widget.

list.title: Widget#getId
list.description: Return this widget's unique numeric ID.

list.title: Widget#getNode
list.description: Alias for get(). Returns this widget's root jQuery node.

list.title: Widget#getWidgets
list.description: Return the array of child widget instances owned by this widget.

list.title: Widget#hide
list.description: Hide this widget's root node with an optional jQuery animation.

list.title: Widget#hideLoading
list.description: Remove the loading spinner overlay and re-enable interactive elements.

list.title: Widget#init
list.description:
Async initialization hook. Override in subclasses to load data, CSS,
or set up state before the widget renders. Called automatically unless
autoInit is false.

list.title: Widget#loadingOverlayTemplate
list.description: Default HTML template for the loading spinner overlay, used by showLoading()

list.title: Widget#off
list.description:
Remove event handler(s). If handler is provided, removes that specific handler.
If handler is omitted, removes ALL handlers for the given event.

list.title: Widget#on
list.description: Subscribe to a widget event. Multiple handlers per event are supported.

list.title: Widget#once
list.description:
Subscribe to an event for a single firing only. The handler automatically
unsubscribes after its first invocation.

list.title: Widget#render
list.description:
Render hook. Override in subclasses to populate the widget's DOM after
init() completes. Called automatically after init() unless autoInit is false.

list.title: Widget#replaceNode
list.description: Replace an existing DOM element with this widget's root node.

list.title: Widget#show
list.description: Show this widget's root node with an optional jQuery animation.

list.title: Widget#showLoading
list.description:
Show a loading spinner overlay on top of this widget (or a specific child node).
Disables interactive elements while loading. Call hideLoading() to dismiss.

list.title: Widget#widgetId
list.description: Auto-incrementing counter used to assign unique IDs to widget instances

list.title: Widget._$
list.description:
Normalize any DOM reference (HTMLElement, jQuery object, or CSS selector string)
into a jQuery object. Returns null for null/undefined input.
Used internally to accept flexible DOM arguments across the API.

list.title: Widget.findWidgetNodeById
list.description:
Find the DOM node for a widget by its ID using a CSS attribute selector.
Useful when you have the ID but not the instance.

list.title: Widget.getByNode
list.description:
Get the Widget instance that owns a given DOM node.
Reads the widgetId attribute from the node and looks it up in the registry.

list.title: Widget.getWidgetById
list.description: Look up a widget instance by its numeric ID from the global registry.

list.title: Widget.isWidget
list.description: Check whether a DOM node is a widget by looking for the widgetId attribute.

list.title: Widget.loadCss
list.description: Load a CSS stylesheet with deduplication. Convenience wrapper around ResourceLoader.

list.title: Widget.loadScript
list.description: Load a JavaScript file with deduplication. Convenience wrapper around ResourceLoader.

list.title: Widget.parseParams
list.description:
Replace {{key}} placeholders in a string with corresponding values from an object.
Used internally for template variable substitution.

list.title: module.exports
list.description: Widgets - Re-export all widget categories
